title: Navigating Utility Transitions: Transferring Your Ethio Telecom and Electric Service to Your New Home
excerpt: Utility transitions Addis: Ethio telecom transfer, electric service new home, meter readings, account closure, moving checklist internet and power setup.
content:
Navigating utility transitions: transferring your Ethio telecom and electric service to your new home

Boxes arrive but life stops without power dial tone and Wi-Fi—utility transitions botched leave you camping in condo with flashlight apps. Ethio telecom and electric service transfers need meter readings, account closure at old address, and new connection often queued behind bureaucracy while mover waits for elevator you cannot call.

This guide navigates Ethio telecom and electric utility transitions when moving to a new home in Addis Ababa.

Electric service transition

Old address closure

  • Final meter reading photographed with timestamp.
  • Pay outstanding bill; request account closure receipt.
  • Landlord witness on reading if deposit dispute risk.

New address activation

Apply with lease copy and ID at utility office or authorized agent. Prepaid versus postpaid meter type—verify before purchase of tokens. Inspection delay possible in new buildings—apply T-14 days minimum.

Ethio telecom transfer

Fixed line and internet

Relocation request with old and new address; equipment return or transfer per package. Fiber availability street-by-street—confirm before assuming same speed tier.

Mobile

Number portability separate process; update billing address in app.

Lead times

Internet installation one to three weeks common—schedule before move night if remote work dependent.

Parallel timeline with move

T-21 days: submit new applications. T-7 days: confirm appointment dates. Move day: old meter photo; new unit test breaker panel. T+1: verify telecom tech completed drop.

Generator and backup

Condo generator rules—test before relying for move-day elevator if power cut. Inverter battery for router maintains connectivity gap days.

Water and other utilities

Compound water often included—confirm. Gas if applicable separate vendor.

Documentation folder

Digital folder: all receipts, account numbers, technician names, appointment screenshots—handover to spouse if you travel move week.

Active Movers note

Elevator and gate need power—confirm utility live or generator scheduled move morning.

Conclusion

Transfer Ethio telecom and electric with early applications, meter photo discipline, and internet lead-time respect—utility transitions complete when new home lights up and router pings before last carton opens.
author: Active Movers Team
